title: Exploring Public Awareness And Safety Measures For Microplastic Consumption In Fish
authors: Caluya, C. I. L., Cejes, M. T. H. M., Habacon, K. L. R., Oliva, J. R. E., & Villegas, J. D. – 2024–2025
meta: Caluya, C. I. L., Cejes, M. T. H. M., Habacon, K. L. R., Oliva, J. R. E., & Villegas, J. D. – 2024–2025
summary: This qualitative phenomenological study investigates public awareness, vendor practices, and government measures on microplastic contamination in fish, revealing low public knowledge, lack of standardized safety checks, and insufficient resources for proper monitoring...

title: Farmers' Perceptions On The Effectiveness Of Ventilation To Hinder Pesticide Exposure

summary: This qualitative phenomenological study explores farmers' perceptions of greenhouse ventilation as a strategy to reduce pesticide exposure, highlighting that proper airflow can improve crop health, reduce pesticide dependence, and promote safer and more sustainable farming practices...

summary: This study examines the marketability and effectiveness of lagundi essential oil as an inhaler product among selected Grade-11 students, evaluating consumer preferences, product viability, and potential market acceptance...
